new_classes.label_de: Tokajerwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger (Unterposition 2204 21 23)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine bearing the Protected Designation of Origin 'Tokaj' (as defined in Additional Note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22), presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres.

new_classes.label_en: Tokaj Protected Designation of Origin quality
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a wine that has been produced and qualified under the Protected Designation of Origin 'Tokaj', as specified in Additional Note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation: The two primary distinguishing criteria for CN 22042123 are: (1) the product must be 'Tokaj' wine bearing the PDO 'Tokaj' as defined in Additional Note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22, and (2) the wine must be presented in containers of 2 litres or less (inherited from parent subheading 2204 21). Both criteria are captured: the TokajPDOQuality class models the PDO requirement, and the existing SmallContainer class (≤ 2 L) covers the container-size restriction. Coverage is set to 0.75 rather than 1.0 because the precise qualifying criteria of Additional Note 4(B)(b) (e.g. specific geographic delimitation of the Tokaj wine region, grape variety requirements, production rules, permitted wine types and alcohol/sugar levels under that note) are not independently resolvable from the legal text provided — only a reference to that note is given. The internal content of Additional Note 4(B)(b) would be needed to fully formalise all sub-criteria. No relevant measure type, footnote, or certificate individuals from that note are present in the running TBox, so no further regulatory restrictions could be added.
